item.title: Adam Zyglis’s work is poignant and sharp.
item.description: http://www.adamzyglis.com/ "I’m thrilled to announce I’ve won the 2025 Sigma Delta Chi Award for Editorial Cartooning! It’s an honor to be recognized again by the Society of Professional Journalists, an organization that promotes and celebrates excellence in journalism around the country. Thank you to the SPJ and The Buffalo News. ?" From the judges: “These are challenging days for editorial cartoonists. It’s easy to get so angry - the results are hot instead of illuminating. Zyglis keeps a sense of humor and irony, without resorting to cheap shots. And that makes him special right now.” ✍️ The Buffalo News Society of Pro. Journalists
item.dc:creator: onerousempire

item.title: This should be studied with Terry Pratchett Boot Theory
item.dc:creator: malbec

item.title: In China, it's a tradition for the father of the bride to feed her one last time before her wedding
item.description: This ritual, commonly referred to as the "last bite" tradition, serves as a symbol of the bride's transition from her childhood home to her new family. This is both beautiful and sad at the same time. Neither one of them could keep their composure as the significance of what they were doing started to sink in.

item.title: remember
item.description: The son of Lorenzo Salgado Araujo, a Mexican immigrant who was shot and killed during a traffic stop in Houston, by ICE. item.title: Body shaming is very important for so many industries profits
item.description: Fashion magazines, social media apps, celebrity gossip websites, reality TV shows, photo editing apps, makeup brands, anti-aging skincare lines, hair dye and extension companies, tanning salons, hair removal services, gyms, fitness studios, diet pill manufacturers, weight-loss programs, detox tea and shake brands, calorie-counting apps, plastic surgery clinics, Botox and filler providers, medical spas, teeth whitening brands, shapewear brands, fast-fashion retailers, push-up bra manufacturers, and high-heel designers all profit from attacking a women's body image.

item.title: There’s something satisfying about grafting - taking a strong rootstock and giving it a better variety on top. One clean cut, a little patience, and you’ve created something new.
item.description: In successful grafting the cambium layers align and fuse. Callus tissue forms over the joint, then new bark grows across the union so it eventually looks seamless as the tree heals and thickens. Great technique!

item.title: GovBrief Today #526
item.description: A Trump-appointed judge erased the Proud Boys' seditious conspiracy convictions today and wrote that no one should mistake his ruling for agreement. Judge Timothy Kelly sat through the six-month trial where a jury convicted the group's leaders of plotting to keep Trump in power by force on January 6. The Justice Department asked him to throw out those verdicts as "Biden-era weaponized prosecutions." Kelly noted the case began while Trump was still president, but granted the motion anyway because he "lacks the authority to compel the Executive to pursue a prosecution, full stop." The government ran the same play in Texas this week. Presidio, a small town on the Rio Grande, sued two weeks ago because the border wall would sit on the levee that keeps it from flooding, built without the engineering review a 127-year-old law requires. Homeland Security answered the lawsuit by waiving the law. The Trump administration has learned it's easy to win when you can edit the rule book at will. I've emailed 8,180 stories over 526 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/ Today's full brief: https://go.govbrief.today/260710-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/wh-financing [2] https://go.govbrief.today/howe-bridge-open [3] https://www.cbsnews.com/live-updates/us-iran-war-trump-ceasefire-talks-strait-of-hormuz/ [4] https://go.govbrief.today/wildlife-rule [5] https://go.govbrief.today/wielicki-appointmed [6] https://go.govbrief.today/nyt-reporters-subponeaed [7] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-housing-refusal [8] https://go.govbrief.today/helo-pilots [9] https://go.govbrief.today/proud-boys-dismissal [10] https://go.govbrief.today/border-wall-lawsuit [11] https://go.govbrief.today/salgado-araujo-witnesses [12] https://go.govbrief.today/pool-drained [13] https://www.hobokennj.gov/news/ada-robot [14] https://go.govbrief.today/nyt-eeoc-counter Subscribe (It's free!): https://gbounacos.substack.com/
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1744 (fragment 147)
item.description:
Lets get this bread.
Bronzed Cowbirds
This is a beautiful happenstance
Fucking love my parthenogenic whiptail babes.
Oops should have saved this for a wizard dump.
I'm not sure I've ever been anyone's first choice for dating.
@AlmostCertainlyNotPickles
I know, the real one is O Brother Where Art Thou?, but this made me laugh.
Yuuup.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "pippin. Pippin? Pippin! Oh no." ___ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: 22 nice and wholesome things to brighten your day, vol 310
item.description:
Your life matters and you are here for a reason.
My son loves axolotls, so for his 7th birthday I decided to embarrass myself and show up as one. I was expecting the kids to laugh… I wasn’t expecting my son to run up and shout ‘that’s my mummy, she’s the best!’ to everyone. ~u/Sybriarla
He finally trusts me enough to show me his little belly. ~u/Delicious-Matter-582
~u/Flava_rave If there has been something you've been procrastinating about, I hope this post helped you get the good feelings you needed to go back and get it done. See you tomorrow.
item.dc:creator: hoopsnek

item.title: Apparently we cant say "fuck you and AI" in a comment even if the post is deleted
item.description: But Mars can keep on posting comments telling us to kill ourselves. Fuck you Imgur. Ill keep on commenting like this and more now. FUCK YOU BUSINESS DADDY AND FUCK AI
